channel.title: Starting Point on Logan Dawson
channel.description: Recent content in Starting Point on Logan Dawson

item.title: Appointment — HackTheBox Starting Point Walkthrough
item.description: HackTheBox Appointment walkthrough: exploit a PHP login form with SQL injection authentication bypass on this Very Easy Linux box. Perfect intro to SQLi.

item.title: Crocodile — HackTheBox Starting Point Walkthrough
item.description: HackTheBox Crocodile walkthrough: exploit anonymous FTP access to harvest credentials, then brute-force a hidden PHP login page. Very Easy Linux box.

item.title: Responder — HackTheBox Starting Point Walkthrough
item.description: HackTheBox Responder walkthrough: exploit LFI to steal NTLMv2 hashes via UNC path injection, crack with John, and gain WinRM access. Very Easy Windows box.

item.title: Sequel — HackTheBox Starting Point Walkthrough
item.description: HackTheBox Sequel walkthrough: exploiting unauthenticated MariaDB access on port 3306 to enumerate databases and retrieve the flag. Very Easy Linux box.

item.title: Three — HackTheBox Starting Point Walkthrough
item.description: HackTheBox Three writeup: exploit a misconfigured LocalStack S3 bucket to upload a PHP webshell and gain RCE on this Linux Starting Point machine.

item.title: Oopsie — HackTheBox Starting Point Walkthrough
item.description: HackTheBox Oopsie walkthrough: exploit IDOR, broken access control, and PHP upload to get a shell, then escalate via SUID PATH hijacking to root.

item.title: Unified — HackTheBox Starting Point Walkthrough
item.description: HackTheBox Unified walkthrough: exploit Log4Shell (CVE-2021-44228) against UniFi Network 6.4.54, manipulate MongoDB to gain admin, and recover root SSH creds.

item.title: Vaccine — HackTheBox Starting Point Walkthrough
item.description: HackTheBox Vaccine walkthrough: anonymous FTP, zip cracking, PostgreSQL SQL injection with sqlmap --os-shell, and vi GTFOBins privilege escalation on this Very Easy Linux box.

item.title: Archetype — HackTheBox Starting Point Walkthrough
item.description: HackTheBox Archetype walkthrough: exploit MSSQL xp_cmdshell via SMB credential leak, escalate to Administrator using PSReadLine history. Windows easy box.

item.title: Dancing — HackTheBox Starting Point Walkthrough
item.description: HackTheBox Dancing writeup — exploit anonymous SMB null session access on Windows to enumerate shares and retrieve the flag. Perfect for beginners.

item.title: Fawn — HackTheBox Starting Point Walkthrough
item.description: HackTheBox Fawn walkthrough: exploit anonymous FTP login on vsftpd 3.0.3 to retrieve the flag. A beginner-friendly intro to FTP enumeration and misconfigurations.

item.title: Meow — HackTheBox Starting Point Walkthrough
item.description: HackTheBox Meow walkthrough: exploit an exposed Telnet service with blank root credentials for an instant shell. Perfect intro to CTF methodology.

item.title: Redeemer — HackTheBox Starting Point Walkthrough
item.description: HackTheBox Redeemer walkthrough: exploiting unauthenticated Redis access to retrieve flags. A beginner-friendly intro to Redis enumeration and misconfiguration.
